calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: INV-074 crystallization necessity test -- post-Phase-3-enrichment retest (supersedes V3-EXQ-610b)
items.note: Retest of INV-074 crystallization-necessity claim following IGW-20260601-023 substrate implementation (test_bed_enrichment_crystallization_necessity). V3-EXQ-610b (2026-06-01) FAILed with D2=false: the no-crystallization control arm did NOT show predicted post-Phase-3 diversity collapse (d2_delta -0.0057). Per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-610a_2026-06-01, the cause was test-bed ceiling: CausalGridWorldV2 supplied no post-Phase-3 destabilising pressure to force continued forward-model adaptation. IGW-20260601-023 implemented the substrate fix: infant_curriculum.InfantCurriculumScheduler Phase 3 now enables SD-047 multi_source_dynamics (weather_field + transient_events + background_drift with n_drift_sources=2), SD-048 interoceptive_noise (autonomic + sensitisation + fatigue at scale=0.6), and accelerated env_drift (interval=3, prob=0.5). These dynamics should force F-reconsolidation post-Phase-3. Prediction: ARM_0 (no crystallization) will now show entropy collapse (D2 delta >= +0.10); ARM_1 (MECH-333/334 crystallization) will preserve Phase-2 diversity. 2-arm design: ARM_0 control (crystallize=false) vs ARM_1 test (crystallize=true), both with MECH-313 noise_floor + MECH-260 dACC + MECH-341 E3 score diversity (retuned) + differential_heads (ARC-062 fix). 3 matched seeds (42/43/44), 4-phase infant curriculum (Phases 0-3), 2500 episodes @ 200 steps/ep. Pre-registered acceptance: D1 (ARM_1 - ARM_0 at end_phase_3 >= +0.10) AND D2 (ARM_0 phase_2 - phase_3 >= +0.10) AND D3 (both arms > 0.4 at phase_2). Interpretation grid in script docstring. Dry-run smoke test PASS 2026-06-01T18:48Z: end-to-end without crash, validate_experiments AST conformance OK, emit_outcome sentinel wired. claim_ids per Accuracy Rule: direct test of INV-074/MECH-333/MECH-334 only. experiment_purpose=evidence. Authored via IGW-20260601-028 (auto-spawned retest-after-substrate). Phase3-queue snapshot race hazard mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md (post-commit dropped-file check).

items.title: MECH-229 identity-distinct wanting retest on SD-049 Phase 3 substrate (retry of 514k FAIL)
items.notes: MECH-229 retest on SD-049 Phase 3 substrate (use_sd049_per_axis_consumer_cascade=True). Supersedes V3-EXQ-514k which FAILed row1b_joint_identity_probe_weak on 2026-06-01. MECH-229 was demoted active -> provisional on 2026-06-01 with pending_retest_after_substrate=true. Prior PASSes (EXQ-074f, 234, 354) were on single-resource substrate (degenerate test). Phase 3 consumer cascade (incl MECH-295 axis-matched routing) landed 2026-05-31. Tests identity-distinct wanting on multi-resource substrate per pending_retest_after_substrate gate. 4-arm design: ARM_0 off / ARM_1 2-type / ARM_2 3-type / ARM_3 5-type. Pre-registered PASS: C0-C3b probe/classifier gates, C4 ARM_2 goal_resource_r >= 0.5, C5 ARM_2 - ARM_0 lift >= 0.4, C6 ARM_2 wanting!=liking trajectory fraction >= 0.6. Authored as IGW-20260602-029 auto-spawned retest-after-substrate task.

items.title: Q-045/MECH-313/MECH-260 + FP-2 dissociation on scaffolded_sd054_onboarding (re-issue of 603d on hook-fixed scheduler + z_goal_enabled config)
items.note: Substrate-readiness validation (EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=diagnostic) of the 2026-06-02 implement-substrate AMEND (scaffolded_sd054_onboarding update_z_goal wiring, ree-v3 deb24cc). THREE changes vs 603d: (1) restored P0/P1=100/50 budget; (2) from_dims sets z_goal_enabled=True + drive_weight=2.0 (603d omitted it -> goal_state None -> update_z_goal early-returned); (3) bespoke P2 loop now calls update_z_goal each step. Acceptance: z_goal_norm_peak > 0.4 on >=2/3 seeds in P2 AND P1 survival gate passed on >=2/3 seeds. Forced-seed verification confirmed the 603e P2 path forms z_goal (peak 0.36 at 25 steps). claim_ids recorded as context (diagnostic; not governance-weighted).

items.title: MECH-341 within-class temperature 4-arm sweep -- corrected harness (committed-class metric + within-class diagnostics + cross-seed-mean C1; supersedes 614c)
items.note: CORRECTED-HARNESS re-run of the MECH-341 stratified_within_class_temperature validation. Supersedes V3-EXQ-614c, which RAN (12/12 cells, no crash) but was reclassified non_contributory for MECH-341 due to TWO test-harness defects (NOT substrate falsification; see failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-614c_2026-06-01 + outstanding_tasks_triage_2026-06-02 item 3). Substrate config is BIT-IDENTICAL to 614c (SD-056-amended 4-substrate baseline: SP-CEM + MECH-341 entropy_bias_scale=2.0 + MECH-313 + V_s minimal + 5 SD-056 levers); the ONLY change is the measurement harness. Defect-1 fix (C2 was vacuous): 614c measured selected_class_entropy at the score-layer argmin(last_scores), temperature-INVARIANT to the within-class lever (the lever only changes the committed within-class representative inside stratified_select, when a class holds >=2 candidates) -> ARM_1/2/3 were bit-identical. 614d's C2 reads the COMMITTED-action class distribution (committed_class_entropy_nats) via a per-seed PAIRED lift over ARM_0_LEGACY (margin 0.05 nats, >=2/3 seeds), and records the lever's firing diagnostics per seed (mech341_n_within_class_sampled / mech341_n_stratified_fired / mech341_last_within_class_temperature) from agent.score_diversity.get_state() so a null result is readable as 'branch starved by env' vs 'branch active but no lift'. Defect-2 fix (C1 mis-specified): 614c required >=2/3 ARM_0 per-seed entropies IN the [0.720,0.880] band; ARM_0 cross-seed mean was 0.7999 (no regression) but 0/3 landed in band. 614d's C1 compares the ARM_0_LEGACY CROSS-SEED MEAN of selected_class_entropy (the 614b-equivalent metric) against the band. Acceptance: C1 ARM_LEGACY reproduces 614b ALL_ON 0.800 +/-10% (regression guard, cross-seed mean); C2 >=1 of {0.5,1.0,2.0} lifts committed-class entropy on majority of seeds; C3 frac_pre_ge2>0.3 on all 4 arms / majority seeds. PASS=C1 AND (C2 OR C3); 5-row interpretation grid (incl. branch-active vs branch-starved split on the C1+C3-only cell). 4 arms x 3 seeds (42/43/44) x 90 ep (P0 30 / P1 60) x 200 steps. EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=diagnostic (excluded from confidence/conflict scoring); claim_ids=[MECH-341] recorded as context. Gates MECH-341 v3_pending clearance, the Q-054 re-issue (V3-EXQ-616a), and arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-B (V3-EXQ-543l cohort) at the governance-decision level. use_differentiable_cem NOT flipped (default False; SD-055 safety note preserved). Mac-pinned (DLAPTOP-4.local) for direct numerical comparability with the 614b/614c reference manifests (C1 regression guard). validate_experiments AST OK; dry-run smoke PASS (4 arms run, progress instrumentation correct M=90/verdict/boundary, emit_outcome sentinel wired); within-class plumbing verified (positive-temp arm shows n_within_class_sampled=10, committed_class_entropy populated). Phase3-queue snapshot race hazard mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md (post-commit dropped-file check).

items.title: ARC-029 committed-mode harm-outcomes revalidation under MECH-090 R-c commit-entry gate (supersedes V3-EXQ-063; post stale_substrate MARK)
items.note: Substrate-staleness revalidation flagged by epoch_stale_evidence_review_2026-06-02. ARC-029 (committed vs ablated operating-mode harm outcomes) had its sole passing run v3_exq_063 (2026-03-22) de-weighted today (scoring_excluded=stale_substrate, superseded_by_substrate=MECH-090@2026-05-28) because the MECH-090 R-c commit-entry readiness predicate landed 2026-05-28, changing WHICH ticks enter committed mode. This re-runs the identical 2x2 gate x environment design (stable drift=0.0 / volatile drift=0.4) with config.heartbeat.use_commit_readiness_gate=True (within-tick decisiveness axis; BetaGate.should_admit_elevation, floor=0.05; fires on score_margin every committed tick -- wiring verified: margin<0.05 blocks, >=0.05 admits, gate-OFF admits unconditionally). The across-tick nav_competence axis is intentionally OFF (needs a harness outcome-push absent in this design; would sit fail-open). Single claim ARC-029 (re-evaluated per claim_ids accuracy rule; gate change adds/removes no claim). PASS criteria unchanged from 063: C1 harm_gap_stable>0, C2 gap narrows in volatile, C3 gate elevates in committed-stable (now also confirms R-c gate still permits commitment), C4 ablation complete, C5 no fatal errors. evidence direction supports/mixed/weakens by criteria_met. Smoke PASS (end-to-end run, sentinel emitted, manifest scrubbed). SD-049 revalidation NOT queued -- already covered by queued V3-EXQ-514l (Phase-3 substrate, tags SD-049). Phase3-queue snapshot race hazard mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md post-commit dropped-file check.

items.title: ARC-068 / MECH-320 Niv-vs-Salamone opportunity-cost-vs-effort-cost dissociation
items.note: ARC-068 (action.opportunity_cost_no_op_penalty) Niv-vs-Salamone discriminative test on MECH-320 w_passive implementation. EXP-0081 / EVB-0237 dispatch_mode=discriminative_pair. ARC-068 lit-pull R3 verdict 2026-05-16 preserves slot-level registration; implementation collapses into MECH-320. R4 verdict: ARC-068 must NOT collapse into MECH-258 / SD-032b dacc_effort_cost (Salamone & Correa 2003 dissociation). 4-arm design: ARM_0 baseline / ARM_1 vigor + Niv env / ARM_2 vigor + Salamone elevated-movement-cost env / ARM_3 baseline + Salamone env. Forced-vigor probe v_t_floor=0.05 implements V3-EXQ-549 prescribed fix (substrate fired correctly under V3-EXQ-547 readiness but EWMA path stuck at zero under default env config in 549; 549 reclassified non_contributory and routed forced-vigor follow-on). Pre-registered acceptance C1 Niv lift >= 0.03, C2 dissociation < 0.50, C3 gate_product >= 0.5, C4 informative-only no-op penalty. claim_ids=[MECH-320, ARC-068] with evidence_direction_per_claim. MECH-258 / SD-032b are foils dissociated from, NOT tested directly. 4-row interpretation grid in script docstring: PASS = ARC-068 supports; C2 FAIL = ARC-068 weakens (effort-cost collapse, surface supersession question to /governance); C1 FAIL + C3 PASS = /failure-autopsy; C3 FAIL = /diagnose-errors. Phase3-queue snapshot race hazard mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md (post-commit dropped-file check).

items.title: MECH-306 sustained_drive_trace evidence validation (2-arm drive_floor ablation: SUSTAINED 0.9 vs OFF 0.0)
items.note: Evidence-purpose, MECH-306-tagged validation so governance can move MECH-306 off candidate_substrate_landed. MECH-306 (goal_seeding.sustained_drive_trace) has only a diagnostic/non_contributory post-landing run (V3-EXQ-582a PASS 2026-05-19, claim_ids=[], predates MECH-306 registration 2026-05-20) -- no governance-weighting evidence. This 2-arm ablation isolates the load-bearing sustained-trace knob: ARM_SUSTAINED (drive_floor=0.9, drive_ema_alpha=1.0 -- the 582a-validated config) vs ARM_OFF (drive_floor=0.0, instantaneous). Acceptance (pre-registered, mirrors 582a A1-A4): A1 ARM_SUSTAINED mean_effective_benefit_on_contact>0.08; A2 seedings fire in >=2/3 seeds; A3 z_goal_active_fraction>0.05; A4 FALSIFIER ARM_OFF total seedings==0. PASS -> evidence_direction=supports MECH-306. EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=evidence; claim_ids=[MECH-306]. Dry-run smoke PASS at harness level 2026-06-02T17:03Z: A1 already fires at dry scale (SUSTAINED eff_benefit 0.098 vs OFF 0.035), A4 falsifier holds (OFF zero seedings); A2/A3 are budget-limited at dry scale (4/3 ep) and need the full 30/20-ep run as 582a did; progress instrumentation correct (ep N/30, 6 verdicts = 3 seeds x 2 arms). validate_experiments OK; emit_outcome wired.

items.title: ARC-068 / MECH-320 Niv-vs-Salamone opportunity-cost-vs-effort-cost dissociation (supersedes 624; body_obs_dim fix + uniform obs space)
items.note: Supersedes V3-EXQ-624, which crashed deterministically (RuntimeError: mat1 and mat2 shapes cannot be multiplied (1x17 and 12x12)) on the Salamone-arm P1 env switch: the agent's body encoder was built from the limb_damage-OFF P0 env (body_obs_dim=12) but ARM_2/ARM_3 switched their P1 env to limb_damage-ON (body_obs_dim=17). 624a enables limb_damage on ALL arms (uniform body_obs_dim=17) and carries the Niv-vs-Salamone manipulation through damage_increment/failure_prob_scale ONLY (0.0 = free movement for Niv arms + all P0; elevated for Salamone P1) -- fixing the crash AND removing the observation-dimensionality confound from the dissociation test. Scientific question unchanged: is MECH-320's no-op penalty movement-cost-sensitive (Salamone) or insensitive (Niv). claim_ids=[MECH-320, ARC-068]; MECH-258/SD-032b are dissociated foils, not tested. v_t_floor=0.05 forced-vigor probe (V3-EXQ-549 fix). Pre-registered C1 Niv lift>=0.03, C2 dissociation<0.50, C3 gate_product>=0.5, C4 informative. 4-row interpretation grid in script docstring. Phase3-queue snapshot race hazard mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md.
